---
name: Documentation feedback
about: Suggest corrections or improvements to HC:// TRUST LAYER documentation.
title: "[Docs] "
labels: [documentation]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the documentation issue or improvement.

## Affected file or record
Provide the document path, section heading, or related record.

## Current behavior or wording
Describe what the documentation currently says.

## Expected behavior or wording
Describe the improved wording, structure, or missing content.

## Verification impact
Explain whether the documentation issue can cause verification mistakes or inconsistent interpretation.

## Security / trust impact
Explain whether this issue could lead to trust, integrity, or operational misunderstandings.

## Additional context
Add references, examples, or links to related material.
